name: Live camera detection: a live feed (webcam index, RTSP/HTTP URL, or file path) flows over the lossy `nats-latest` `frames` data channel; a YOLO26 + ByteTrack detector drains it per frame, emits each recognized object on the `detections` control channel, and streams a box-annotated MJPEG feed over `annotated`; a consumer-edge gather folds the detections into a per-class report. LIVE-ONLY (the detector cold-installs ultralytics/torch + downloads yolo26n.pt — past the 60 s test cap; and a webcam source needs camera permission). Run via `mekhan run … --start-tokens sample-input.json` and read the instance outputs / tap the `annotated` channel.
